name: price-adjustments
title: GoDaddy Price Adjustment API

endpoints.summary: Get all price adjustments for a store
endpoints.description: Gets all applicable price adjustments for a given storeId

schema.description: The storeId that this price adjustment belongs to

items.title: PriceAdjustment
items.description: Price Adjustment Entity; contains all the information about a price adjustment

storeId.description: The storeId that this price adjustment belongs to

id.description: A unique identifier for the price adjustment. Auto-generated on creation

createdAt.description: The datetime when the entity was created

updatedAt.description: The datetime when the entity was last updated

name.description: The user friendly name of the price adjustment

description.description: The user friendly description of the price adjustment
description.example: 15% off of drinks, 10% off of food

type.description: The type of the price adjustment
type.title: PriceAdjustmentType

enabled.description: flag for status of the price adjustment

appliedBeforeTax.description: flag for if the price adjustment should be applied pre- or post- tax

code.description:
Fee or discount code. Must be a unique code per store 
- two different stores are allowed to have the same code
- the same store is not allowed to have two of the same code

items.title: ExternalId
items.description:
ExternalId is a unique identifier for a resource that is not managed by the PriceAdjustments service.
For example, an AvalaraId is an external id that is used to identify a tax code in Avalara.

NOTE: this field has no current use in the PriceAdjustments service, but is included for use in future integrations.

type.description: the type of the external id

value.description: the value of the external id

externalIds.description: external ids for this price adjustment

items.title: Metafield
items.description: Metafield to enable attachng additional contextual meta-information to a resource.

key.description: The unique identifier for the metafield in its namespace

type.description: The type of data that the metafield stores in the `value` field

value.description: The data to store in the metafield. The data is always stored as a string, regardless of the metafield's type

amountType.title: AmountType
amountType.description:
Possible ways to calculate the price adjustment amount; currently either a `PERCENTAGE` or `AMOUNT` is supported.
- If the type is `AMOUNT`, the property `amount` in the request body is required.
- If the type is `PERCENTAGE`, the property `ratePercentage` in the request body is required.

amount.description: the currency code & amount of currency that makes up the amount discounted or charged for this price adjustment. Present if amountType = AMOUNT, else not present
amount.title: Simple Money

value.description: The value, which might represent intergrals for currencies like `JPY` that are not typically fractional; or, with an implied decimal fraction for currencies like `TND` that are subdivided into thousandths. For the implied number of decimal places for a currency code, see [ISO-4217 Currency Codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

ratePercentage.description: the percentage that makes up the amount discounted or charged for this price adjustment. Present id amountType = PERCENTAGE, else not present

code.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

code.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

code.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

422.description: The server understands the content type of the request entity, and the syntax of the request entity is correct, but it was unable to process the contained instructions.

code.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

code.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

items.description: items this price adjustment association apply to

schema.title: PriceAdjustmentAssociation
schema.description: Price Adjustment Association Entity; contains all the information about a price adjustment association

storeId.description: The storeId that this price adjustment belongs to

id.description: A unique identifier for the price adjustment association. Auto-generated on creation

createdAt.description: The datetime when the entity was created

updatedAt.description: The datetime when the entity was last updated

priceAdjustmentId.description: the id of the price adjustment that this price adjustment association refers to

items.title: ExternalId
items.description:
ExternalId is a unique identifier for a resource that is not managed by the PriceAdjustments service.
For example, an AvalaraId is an external id that is used to identify a tax code in Avalara.

NOTE: this field has no current use in the PriceAdjustments service, but is included for use in future integrations.

type.description: the type of the external id

value.description: the value of the external id

type.title: PriceAdjustmentAssociationType
type.description: Possible types of price adjustment association; Currently only `ADJUSTMENT` is supported.

name.description: the name for this price adjustment association

items.title: Metafield
items.description: Metafield to enable attachng additional contextual meta-information to a resource.
